mapper.insert: insert into battery_module_cell_realtime ( create_time, update_time, channel_name, port_name, battery_group, module_address, cell_voltage, internal_resistance, cell_temperature, leakage_status, swollen_voltage, success, response_flag, poll_batch_no, poll_started_at ) values ( datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'localtime'), datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'localtime'), #{channelName}, #{portName}, #{batteryGroup}, #{moduleAddress}, #{cellVoltage}, #{internalResistance}, #{cellTemperature}, #{leakageStatus}, #{swollenVoltage}, #{success}, #{responseFlag}, #{pollBatchNo}, #{pollStartedAt} ) on conflict(channel_name, battery_group, module_address) do update set update_time = datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'localtime'), port_name = excluded.port_name, cell_voltage = excluded.cell_voltage, internal_resistance = excluded.internal_resistance, cell_temperature = excluded.cell_temperature, leakage_status = excluded.leakage_status, swollen_voltage = excluded.swollen_voltage, success = excluded.success, response_flag = excluded.response_flag, poll_batch_no = excluded.poll_batch_no, poll_started_at = excluded.poll_started_at

insert into battery_module_cell_realtime ( create_time, update_time, channel_name, port_name, battery_group, module_address, cell_voltage, internal_resistance, cell_temperature, leakage_status, swollen_voltage, success, response_flag, poll_batch_no, poll_started_at ) values
( datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'localtime'), datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'localtime'), #{cell.channelName}, #{cell.portName}, #{cell.batteryGroup}, #{cell.moduleAddress}, #{cell.cellVoltage}, #{cell.internalResistance}, #{cell.cellTemperature}, #{cell.leakageStatus}, #{cell.swollenVoltage}, #{cell.success}, #{cell.responseFlag}, #{cell.pollBatchNo}, #{cell.pollStartedAt} )
on conflict(channel_name, battery_group, module_address) do update set update_time = datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'localtime'), port_name = excluded.port_name, cell_voltage = excluded.cell_voltage, internal_resistance = excluded.internal_resistance, cell_temperature = excluded.cell_temperature, leakage_status = excluded.leakage_status, swollen_voltage = excluded.swollen_voltage, success = excluded.success, response_flag = excluded.response_flag, poll_batch_no = excluded.poll_batch_no, poll_started_at = excluded.poll_started_at

insert into battery_module_group_realtime ( create_time, update_time, channel_name, port_name, battery_group, module_address, charge_discharge_current, float_current, external_voltage, environment_temperature1, environment_temperature2, success, response_flag, poll_batch_no, poll_started_at ) values ( datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'localtime'), datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'localtime'), #{channelName}, #{portName}, #{batteryGroup}, #{moduleAddress}, #{chargeDischargeCurrent}, #{floatCurrent}, #{externalVoltage}, #{environmentTemperature1}, #{environmentTemperature2}, #{success}, #{responseFlag}, #{pollBatchNo}, #{pollStartedAt} ) on conflict(channel_name, battery_group, module_address) do update set update_time = datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'localtime'), port_name = excluded.port_name, charge_discharge_current = excluded.charge_discharge_current, float_current = excluded.float_current, external_voltage = excluded.external_voltage, environment_temperature1 = excluded.environment_temperature1, environment_temperature2 = excluded.environment_temperature2, success = excluded.success, response_flag = excluded.response_flag, poll_batch_no = excluded.poll_batch_no, poll_started_at = excluded.poll_started_at

insert into battery_module_group_realtime ( create_time, update_time, channel_name, port_name, battery_group, module_address, charge_discharge_current, float_current, external_voltage, environment_temperature1, environment_temperature2, success, response_flag, poll_batch_no, poll_started_at ) values
( datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'localtime'), datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'localtime'), #{group.channelName}, #{group.portName}, #{group.batteryGroup}, #{group.moduleAddress}, #{group.chargeDischargeCurrent}, #{group.floatCurrent}, #{group.externalVoltage}, #{group.environmentTemperature1}, #{group.environmentTemperature2}, #{group.success}, #{group.responseFlag}, #{group.pollBatchNo}, #{group.pollStartedAt} )
on conflict(channel_name, battery_group, module_address) do update set update_time = datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'localtime'), port_name = excluded.port_name, charge_discharge_current = excluded.charge_discharge_current, float_current = excluded.float_current, external_voltage = excluded.external_voltage, environment_temperature1 = excluded.environment_temperature1, environment_temperature2 = excluded.environment_temperature2, success = excluded.success, response_flag = excluded.response_flag, poll_batch_no = excluded.poll_batch_no, poll_started_at = excluded.poll_started_at
mapper.select: select id, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, channel_name as channelName, port_name as portName, battery_group as batteryGroup, module_address as moduleAddress, cell_voltage as cellVoltage, internal_resistance as internalResistance, cell_temperature as cellTemperature, leakage_status as leakageStatus, swollen_voltage as swollenVoltage, success, response_flag as responseFlag, poll_batch_no as pollBatchNo, poll_started_at as pollStartedAt from battery_module_cell_realtime where channel_name = #{channelName} and battery_group = #{batteryGroup} order by module_address

select id, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, channel_name as channelName, port_name as portName, battery_group as batteryGroup, module_address as moduleAddress, charge_discharge_current as chargeDischargeCurrent, float_current as floatCurrent, external_voltage as externalVoltage, environment_temperature1 as environmentTemperature1, environment_temperature2 as environmentTemperature2, success, response_flag as responseFlag, poll_batch_no as pollBatchNo, poll_started_at as pollStartedAt from battery_module_group_realtime where channel_name = #{channelName} and battery_group = #{batteryGroup} order by update_time desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into battery_module_group_calculation ( create_time, update_time, channel_name, battery_group, cell_count, online_cell_count, stale_cell_count, data_fresh, max_voltage_module_address, max_cell_voltage, min_voltage_module_address, min_cell_voltage, avg_cell_voltage, voltage_range, max_temperature_module_address, max_cell_temperature, min_temperature_module_address, min_cell_temperature, avg_cell_temperature, temperature_range, max_resistance_module_address, max_internal_resistance, min_resistance_module_address, min_internal_resistance, avg_internal_resistance, resistance_range, external_voltage, charge_discharge_current, float_current, environment_temperature1, environment_temperature2, latest_cell_update_time, latest_group_update_time ) values ( datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'localtime'), datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'localtime'), #{channelName}, #{batteryGroup}, #{cellCount}, #{onlineCellCount}, #{staleCellCount}, #{dataFresh}, #{maxVoltageModuleAddress}, #{maxCellVoltage}, #{minVoltageModuleAddress}, #{minCellVoltage}, #{avgCellVoltage}, #{voltageRange}, #{maxTemperatureModuleAddress}, #{maxCellTemperature}, #{minTemperatureModuleAddress}, #{minCellTemperature}, #{avgCellTemperature}, #{temperatureRange}, #{maxResistanceModuleAddress}, #{maxInternalResistance}, #{minResistanceModuleAddress}, #{minInternalResistance}, #{avgInternalResistance}, #{resistanceRange}, #{externalVoltage}, #{chargeDischargeCurrent}, #{floatCurrent}, #{environmentTemperature1}, #{environmentTemperature2}, #{latestCellUpdateTime}, #{latestGroupUpdateTime} ) on conflict(channel_name, battery_group) do update set update_time = datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'localtime'), cell_count = excluded.cell_count, online_cell_count = excluded.online_cell_count, stale_cell_count = excluded.stale_cell_count, data_fresh = excluded.data_fresh, max_voltage_module_address = excluded.max_voltage_module_address, max_cell_voltage = excluded.max_cell_voltage, min_voltage_module_address = excluded.min_voltage_module_address, min_cell_voltage = excluded.min_cell_voltage, avg_cell_voltage = excluded.avg_cell_voltage, voltage_range = excluded.voltage_range, max_temperature_module_address = excluded.max_temperature_module_address, max_cell_temperature = excluded.max_cell_temperature, min_temperature_module_address = excluded.min_temperature_module_address, min_cell_temperature = excluded.min_cell_temperature, avg_cell_temperature = excluded.avg_cell_temperature, temperature_range = excluded.temperature_range, max_resistance_module_address = excluded.max_resistance_module_address, max_internal_resistance = excluded.max_internal_resistance, min_resistance_module_address = excluded.min_resistance_module_address, min_internal_resistance = excluded.min_internal_resistance, avg_internal_resistance = excluded.avg_internal_resistance, resistance_range = excluded.resistance_range, external_voltage = excluded.external_voltage, charge_discharge_current = excluded.charge_discharge_current, float_current = excluded.float_current, environment_temperature1 = excluded.environment_temperature1, environment_temperature2 = excluded.environment_temperature2, latest_cell_update_time = excluded.latest_cell_update_time, latest_group_update_time = excluded.latest_group_update_time
